---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.

Example: "I want to receive news digests on Discord in addition to Telegram because [reason]."

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include any UI changes, config changes, or new commands.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you look at, and why is the proposed solution better?

## Example

What would the user-facing change look like? A CLI command, a config snippet, a screenshot of a similar tool, or a description of the workflow.

## Scope

How big is this change?

- [ ] Small (config-only, no new code)
- [ ] Medium (one file modified, a few hundred lines)
- [ ] Large (multiple files, new architecture)

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like to discuss the approach first
- [ ] I'm only suggesting the idea

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the feature.
